message:
docs(governance): validate H2 track completion matrix and addmul min-lane policy tests

Extend governance validation tests with two new areas:

H2 closure packet track completion matrix:
- Validate track_completion_criteria array has exactly 5 entries for
  tracks D/E/F/G/H with canonical bead IDs (asupersync-np1co,
  asupersync-2ncba, asupersync-mg1qh, asupersync-2cyx5,
  asupersync-p8o9m)
- Each entry must have: track_code, track_bead_id,
  required_status="closed", current_status, status_reason,
  closure_dependency_path, evidence_refs array
- Cross-check track current_status against Beads issue state
- Validate blocking dependencies match direct-closure-path non-closed
  tracks
- Ensure documentation cross-links include "Track Completion Matrix"
  and all canonical bead IDs

Addmul min-lane policy tests:
- dual_policy_addmul_lane_floor_gate_behaves_as_expected: validates
  1536-byte lane rejection vs 2048-byte acceptance with 2KiB floor
- Update decision matrix test to include RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-007 scenario
  (12288/1536 asymmetric)
- Update symmetry test to include asymmetric test case
- Update schema version from v2 to v3 for addmul_min_lane field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
